title: ItsJustMC+
description:
Vanilla PLUS Modpack

THE BEST VANILLA+ Experience

*vanilla compatibility guaranteed*
body:
### _**The Official Modpack for ItsJustMinecraft**_ (on youtube)

## **Have you ever wanted the best Minecraft experience? Here is your chance!**

**ItsJustMC+** Adds All the Best Quality of Life Mods to make your Minecraft expirience **PERFECT** while also making sure that everything is **100% Vanilla Compatible!**

# **Some Notable features this Modpack adds...**

### Better Visuals ☀️ 
This Modpack Completely Reworks the charming visuals of Minecraft! By adding Dynamic Fog, Improving Clouds and Stars, Reworked Weather Events, and Many New Particle effects thanks to mods like Visuality and Subtle Effects.

### Improve Audio 🔊
This project aims to Completely Improve the Soundscape of Minecraft. By adding Ambient noises, sound reverb, rain and weather audio improvements. Along with NEW sounds within player gui and specialized audio effects such as cooking food on a canpfire!

### New Structures and Dungeons 🗺️ 
Thanks to Mods like Dungeons and Taverns Minecraft Exploration has been completely enchanced! There are hundreds of NEW Vanilla-Like structures scattered around your world! From Revamped Strongholds to New Trail Chambers.

### New World Generation and Balanced Performance 🌎
New Biomes have been added BUT DONT FRET, this world generation is true to Vanilla. By the Power of the CliffTree mod many biomes have recieved a facelift to help make the game feel more fresh! Along with sodium and entity culling performance is greatly Inproved compared to vanilla!

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/MraBDoCZrbc" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

### Want More?
I have created a Texturepack (with Fresh animation support) that will make this Modpack even Better! ItsJustMC+ (Texturepack) makes sure to not stray away from what makes Vanilla textures special! Check my Profile for more!

- Works 100% Client Side
- This Modpack Certified Vanilla Friendly (That means if you make a world with this modpack and then decide to go back to Vanilla your world will still work!)

**Bugs?**
Join my discord and let me know!
